title: houstonia humifusa
intro: Houstonia humifusa, also known as the low sweet grass or sweet grass, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Rubiaceae family and is native to North America. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, inflammation, and respiratory problems, due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Houstonia humifusa include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant, making it an effective treatment for conditions such as indigestion, bronchitis, and asthma. Houstonia humifusa can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, or it can be dried and used in capsule or tincture form for its medicinal properties.
